notes: A major content release. Two brand-new courses, German and Italian, both taught to the B1 level their citizenship exams require. French is rebuilt all the way to B2, the level France now requires for naturalisation. Croatian grows to a full B1 course. Every course was rewritten against its country's official curriculum and word lists, so the vocabulary and grammar now match what the real exam tests. New: a mistake bank that brings back the exercise questions you got wrong until you get them right.
